_comment: IBSRELA DTP email blueprint following the canonical section-background sequencing; sections chosen to exercise conditional rules (background groups, green-panel exclusivity, patient-story disclosure, CTA image pairing).
email_summary: Patient-facing (DTP) IBSRELA email: empathetic hook on unresolved IBS-C symptoms, efficacy proof points, Regina's patient story, the three-symptom trio on the green panel, and a closing campaign CTA to explore IBSRELA.

content_blueprint.headline: Still dealing with IBS-C symptoms?
content_blueprint.copy_outline: If you're still experiencing constipation, belly pain, and bloating, you don't have to settle for feeling just okay. IBSRELA works differently.
content_blueprint.section_summary: Empathetic hero over the purple full-bleed photographic background
content_blueprint.design_concept: Full-bleed purple (#92278F) photographic hero, white headline text, dark background group; wave edge at the bottom transitioning into the white section below.
content_blueprint.rationale: Lead with empathy before product benefit per DTP voice

content_blueprint.headline: IBSRELA delivered results in clinical trials
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Adults taking IBSRELA saw improvement in their IBS-C symptoms. Results may vary; study results seen in 12- and 26-week trials. Footnoted claim with dagger references.
content_blueprint.section_summary: White content section with efficacy claims, qualifier, and footnotes
content_blueprint.design_concept: White background (light group), navy #262262 headline, black body copy, footnote daggers noticeably smaller; inset callout card with 12px radius for the key stat.
content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: 12- and 26-week trial improvements with required qualifier
content_blueprint.rationale: Efficacy proof point after the hook

content_blueprint.headline: Regina flipped the script on her IBS-C
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Short lifestyle narrative from Regina, an actual patient taking IBSRELA, with her quote and the required compensation disclosure beneath. CTA link: Watch Regina's story.
content_blueprint.section_summary: Patient story module with lifestyle photo and disclosure
content_blueprint.design_concept: Light photo section on white/silver, warm lifestyle photography, navy headline, quote styling, small disclosure text directly under the story copy.
content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Individual results and experiences may vary
content_blueprint.rationale: Social proof between efficacy and the symptom trio

content_blueprint.headline: Different matters: Because one size does not fit all
content_blueprint.copy_outline: The three IBS-C symptoms — Constipation, Belly Pain, Bloating — shown as the approved icon trio, followed by supporting copy on how IBSRELA addresses all three.
content_blueprint.section_summary: Green accent panel with the three-symptom icon row
content_blueprint.design_concept: Green #01A47E accent panel (dark background group), the approved circular green-tinted icon trio left-to-right with navy labels, white supporting copy on the panel.
content_blueprint.rationale: The green panel is reserved for the symptom trio in this email

content_blueprint.headline: Ready to try something different?
content_blueprint.copy_outline: Talk to your doctor about IBSRELA. Button: Explore IBSRELA. Right-side campaign visual next to the copy block.
content_blueprint.section_summary: Closing campaign CTA with right-side image
content_blueprint.design_concept: Purple #92278F CTA section (dark group) with the default right-side campaign image in a two-column layout; white headline and body, white pill button with green label, left-aligned text and button.
content_blueprint.rationale: Single closing CTA drives the HCP conversation
